subcodes.first_line: O ye true friends of the Abhá Beauty! Blessed are ye that in the station of servitude to the Ancient Beauty ye are with this servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران حقیقی جمال ابهی خوشا بحال شما که در مقام عبودیت جمال قدم با این عبد
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @growth of the Cause
